g.text: 1. IRLZ44N: logic-level MOSFET (Vgs_th ~1.5V), 3.3V GPIO drives gate directly

g.desc: 1. IRLZ44N: logic-level MOSFET (Vgs_th ~1.5V), 3.3V GPIO drives gate directly

g.text: 2. R2 (10k) pull-down: motor OFF during ESP32 boot/reset/brownout

g.desc: 2. R2 (10k) pull-down: motor OFF during ESP32 boot/reset/brownout

g.text: 3. D1 (1N5819): Schottky for reverse polarity + prevents USB backfeed

g.desc: 3. D1 (1N5819): Schottky for reverse polarity + prevents USB backfeed

g.text: 4. D2 (1N4007): flyback diode, cathode to +5V, anode to Motor-

g.desc: 4. D2 (1N4007): flyback diode, cathode to +5V, anode to Motor-

g.text: 5. C1 (100nF): ceramic bypass across motor for EMI suppression

g.desc: 5. C1 (100nF): ceramic bypass across motor for EMI suppression

g.text: 6. XV11 motor: 500-680mA, use barrel jack or powered USB hub

g.desc: 6. XV11 motor: 500-680mA, use barrel jack or powered USB hub

g.text: 7. ESP32-S3 OPI PSRAM: GPIO26-37 NOT available

g.desc: 7. ESP32-S3 OPI PSRAM: GPIO26-37 NOT available

g.text: 25kHz PWM to Q1 gate via R1

g.desc: 25kHz PWM to Q1 gate via R1

g.text: U1: ESP32-S3-N16R8 (Lonely Binary) on female headers

g.desc: U1: ESP32-S3-N16R8 (Lonely Binary) on female headers
